_note: Canonical NON-SECRET tenant identity for the CADETS (cawgcadets.org) Apps Script project (scriptId 15LW...). Recovered from the pre-clobber cadet config.gs. Enter these as TENANT_* Script Properties on the cadets project — do NOT put them in config.gs (a push overwrites it).
_behavioral_note: The cadet tenant's BEHAVIORAL differences (MEMBER_TYPES.ACTIVE=CADET only, CADET_LITE=true, ACCESS/PUBLIC auto-create off, distribution lists = cadets+parents) are now driven by TENANT_PROFILE=cadets (see the seniors/cadets profiles in src/config.gs). Setting TENANT_PROFILE alone gives correct cadet behavior; no config.gs edits needed.
